focus: RAAI domain confirmations — DC#3 complete (generic RLAIF), 1 more DC for D4

key_insight_c72: RAAI-RLAIF Cascade is a general DPI result, not CAI-specific. DC#3 (generic RLAIF, CPP≈0, no constitutional principles) confirms cascade by shortest DPI argument: CA(X)→A(X)→AI_rater(X)→θ_student→Î(X), mutual information only decreases. Multi-hop RLAIF (any depth) propagates AAA — DPI holds for arbitrary chain length. DC#2 vs DC#3 contrast: DC#2 required analyzing whether CP principles could elevate CPP above AAA bound; DC#3 has no such layer, argument is structurally direct. Constitutional structure is not what causes RAAI — any AI-feedback cascade with OA-calibrated rater has AAA.
next_dc_priority: DC#4 SFT on human ratings — supervised fine-tuning where training labels are human quality ratings (not preferences, not RL, not AI-generated). Markov chain: CA(X)→A(X)→{scalar_ratings}→D→θ→Î(X). DPI applies trivially. Most basic feedback case — establishes RAAI at baseline for SFT paradigm with no RL, no preference pairs, no AI intermediary. After DC#4: RAAI reaches D4 eligibility.

passive_accumulation.RAAI_ZR: cycle 3 complete (C68-C71, 4 cycles without retraction); cycle 4 begins (C72+)
